data.name: Order Up
data.detailed_description:
ORDER UP! is an erotic Arkanoid game where you’ll enjoy a simple and relaxing gameplay experience. Break blocks, bounce the ball with your platform, and gradually reveal stylish and hot images of an alluring waitress.

The game’s mechanics are incredibly simple: control the platform, prevent the ball from falling, and clear levels one block at a time. ORDER UP! is perfect for those who want to unwind with an easy-to-play game and indulge in a pleasant visual experience.

What’s waiting for you in the game?

  • A straightforward and enjoyable Arkanoid gameplay.

  • Seductive images of a captivating waitress.

  • A relaxing and laid-back atmosphere.

  • A pleasant visual style.

  • The perfect way to unwind after a long day.

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DirectX 9
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
